emails.subject: Re: NDA-Purchase Pooling, Inc.
emails.body: Re: NDA-Purchase Pooling, Inc. Tana: Stupid request but it's important to this CP please sent John Nugent a revised form of NDA with Enron Net Works LLC as the only Enron entity (delete both ENA and EOL). Then, I hope that he will review it. Thanks, Leslie Tana Jones 11/15/2000 05:19 PM
